from typing import Union, overload


@overload
def normalize(value: str) -> str: ...


@overload
def normalize(value: list) -> list: ...


@overload
def normalize(value: dict) -> dict: ...


def normalize(value: Union[str, list, dict]) -> Union[str, list, dict]:
    if isinstance(value, str):
        return value.strip().lower()
    elif isinstance(value, list):
        return [normalize(item) for item in value]
    elif isinstance(value, dict):
        return {k: normalize(v) for k, v in value.items()}
    return value


@overload
def format_output(data: str, as_json: bool = False) -> str: ...


@overload
def format_output(data: list, as_json: bool = False) -> str: ...


def format_output(data: Union[str, list], as_json: bool = False) -> str:
    if isinstance(data, str):
        return f'{{"text": "{data}"}}' if as_json else data
    if as_json:
        import json
        return json.dumps(data)
    return "\n".join(str(item) for item in data)
